steps.title: Identify the hypotenuse
steps.content:
The longest side is $TR$, so it is the hypotenuse. Also,
$$360^2+192^2=408^2$$
so the right angle is at $S$.

steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content:
Triangle $RST$ is similar to triangle $UVW$, and $T$ corresponds to $W$. Therefore
$$\tan W=\tan T$$

steps.title: Compute the tangent ratio
steps.content:
For angle $T$, the opposite leg is $RS$ and the adjacent leg is $ST$.
$$\tan W=\frac{360}{192}=\frac{15}{8}$$
The answer is D.
